feedback.text: Additionally i would humbly request that game publisher shan't be allowed to use kernel level system be that for copyright protection or anti-cheat. Very often those systems are weak to hackers if left unattended for example Easy anti cheat is known to be excellent back door to any system. Also they can be used by foreign entities to spy on EU citizens, for example RIOT games vanguard is kernel level anti cheat under control of CCP. Kernel level programs allow manufactures of them to have greater control over device than owner.
